tagline.en: Show your friends what you grew!
tagline.da: Vis dine venner hvad du har dyrket!

theme.hero_task: Pick a harvest basket to share with a friend or teacher

tasks.action: Harvest a basket of mixed produce to share

prompt.en: Pick your best tomatoes, beans, and herbs -- make a gift basket for someone!
prompt.da: Pluk dine bedste tomater, boenner og urter -- lav en gavekurv til nogen!

tasks.action: Daily harvest walk -- Beds A through E

prompt.en: Keep harvesting every day -- if you leave things too long, they get too big!
prompt.da: Bliv ved med at hoeste hver dag -- hvis du venter for laenge, bliver de for store!

prompt.en: Late summer watering -- still important even if it rained!
prompt.da: Sen-sommer vanding -- stadig vigtigt selv om det har regnet!

prompt.en: Peak raspberry season! Pick every ripe one -- they don't wait!
prompt.da: Hoejsaeson for hindbaer! Pluk hvert modent et -- de venter ikke!

tasks.action: Harvest spring onions from Bed D (third batch)

prompt.en: Pull spring onions for a stir-fry or salad topping!
prompt.da: Traek foraarsloeg til en wok eller salat-topping!

growth_events.event: Peak raspberry production -- multiple ripe berries daily

prompt.en: How many raspberries can you pick today? Try to beat yesterday's count!
prompt.da: Hvor mange hindbaer kan du plukke i dag? Proev at slaa gaardagens rekord!

growth_events.event: Calendula still blooming with bright orange flowers

prompt.en: The calendula keeps making flowers! Bees love the orange ones.
prompt.da: Morgenfrue bliver ved med at lave blomster! Bierne elsker de orange.
